Chronology of every recorded fact about [[White Sun medallion]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Andel’s White Sun medallion helped them get through the arena guards.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Andel clutches a White Sun medallion.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Pilgrim wears a White Sun medallion.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Andel carries a White Sun medallion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Andel possesses a White Sun medallion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The White Sun medallion is a silver sun with a white diamond at its heart and pulses with Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The White Sun medallion is an item held by Andel that was glowing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Andel possesses a White Sun medallion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The White Sun medallion is an item held by Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Andel clasps a White Sun medallion.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Loreli's White Sun medallion contains a diamond at its center that acts as her Beacon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
